summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 15→Jul 21 vs Jul 8→Jul 14* · Revenue +56% (1,513,127 vs 966,939 EGP) · Spend +27% · ROAS 6.67 (+23%).
   • CPC: 2.12 → 1.95 EGP (-8%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.01% → 0.86% (-15%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,140 → 1,521 EGP (+33%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 54%* of the move (helped, +379,095 EGP)  ·  *CVR 30%* of the move (hurt, -265,500 EGP)  ·  *CPC 16%* of the move (helped, +19,783 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +33%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *379,095 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +23%.
     Revenue +56% because spend +27%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *A INVENTORY DEC 2025*, its AOV went 733.24 EGP→1306.96 EGP on 7,826 EGP spend (~7% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 15→Jul 21 vs Jul 8→Jul 14* · Revenue +34% (228,353 vs 170,602 EGP) · Spend +45% · ROAS 3.84 (-8%).
   • CPC: 9.94 → 8.28 EGP (-17%, down (good))
   • CVR: 2.38% → 1.91% (-20%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,741 → 1,667 EGP (-4%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 49%* of the move (hurt, -56,208 EGP)  ·  *CPC 41%* of the move (helped, +11,909 EGP)  ·  *AOV 10%* of the move (hurt, -10,138 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -20%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-56,208 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -8%.
     Revenue +34% because spend +45%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255403883410011|NEW ARRIVALS NEW VIDEOW CUTSWIMWEAR BIRDNEST>, its CVR went 8.0%→2.68% on 6,394 EGP spend (~80% of the swing).
